title: Filipino-Style Date Cake
description: A moist and flavorful cake infused with the sweetness of dates and the warmth of Filipino spices.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish.
In a blender or food processor, puree the pitted dates until smooth.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the fluffy cake mix, eggs, coconut milk, vegetable oil, vanilla extract, and baking powder. Mix until well combined.
Add the date puree to the cake mixture and mix until smooth.
Pour the batter into the prepared baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove the cake from the oven and let it cool in the pan for 10 minutes.
Transfer the cake to a wire rack to cool completely.
Once the cake is cool, you can frost it with your favorite frosting or glaze.
